text:
Mike Harding on 2001-06-21 (Thu) at 21:36:46 -0700:
> 
> >Synopsis:       Gimp manual port 1-2 years out of date, maintainer AWOL

Have you only tried to contact him at his current MAINTAINER address?  When
he originally submitted the port, he used <brett@peloton.physics.montana.edu>.
The latter is at least a valid and routable mail domain...

-- V
